spec: Test invalid login on https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com\\n and verify error message stays on login page

plan.goal: Test invalid login and verify error message stays on login page
assumptions: The login page is accessible at the provided URL.
Error messages are displayed on the login page for invalid credentials.

args.description: Test invalid login scenarios and verify error message visibility.
